scripts.preextract: rm -f ios/Pods/ReactNativeDependencies/.last_build_configuration ios/Pods/React-Core-prebuilt/.last_build_configuration ios/Pods/hermes-engine/.last_build_configuration && (find ios/Pods/ReactNativeDependencies/framework -mindepth 1 -delete 2>/dev/null; rmdir ios/Pods/ReactNativeDependencies/framework 2>/dev/null; find ios/Pods/React-Core-prebuilt/React.xcframework -mindepth 1 -delete 2>/dev/null; rmdir ios/Pods/React-Core-prebuilt/React.xcframework 2>/dev/null; true) && cd ios/Pods && node ../../node_modules/react-native/third-party-podspecs/replace_dependencies_version.js -c Release -r 0.85.3 -p . && node ../../node_modules/react-native/scripts/replace-rncore-version.js -c Release -r 0.85.3 -p .
scripts.device: npm run preextract && (lsof -ti:8081 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true) && concurrently "react-native start" "react-native run-ios --device 'Bingo Bango'"
